sections.paragraph: [Shinar] pr.n. of the region around Babylon, Gen 11:2 14:1 Isa 11:11 Zec 5:11 Dan 1:2. As to its extent, see Gen 10:10. Compare Bochart, Phaleg. i. 5. J. D. Mich. Spicileg. Geogr. i. p. 231. (Syr. ܣܶܢܥܳܪ used of the country round Bagdad, see Barhebr. p. 256). The derivation is unknown.
